description: A ground-level photograph depicting rows of olive trees extending into the distance under a bright sky. The foreground shows dry, light-coloured soil with sparse green vegetation between the tree rows. In the mid-ground, more olive trees and other vegetation are visible, leading to a hazy background with hills or mountains. The image exemplifies an olive grove, relevant to Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Land Use / Land Cover (LULC) classification categories such as CORINE Land Cover (CLC) class 2.2.2.0 (Olive groves) or 2.2.1.0 (Fruit trees and berry plantations).
